trigger_queries.query: Turn this PRD into falsifiable REQ-* requirements with acceptance criteria and verification methods.
assertions: Includes source trace and verification method
Rejects vague wording instead of inventing precision

trigger_queries.query: Verify this implementation against the written contract and list missing acceptance tests.
assertions: Uses the contract as source of truth
Separates blocked requirements from verified ones

trigger_queries.query: Prototype a quick dashboard however you think is best.
assertions: Does not activate for unscoped prototyping
Requests a spec before deriving requirements

trigger_queries.query: The requirements are already locked; now execute RED/GREEN/REFACTOR against them.
assertions: Does not run TDD execution itself

trigger_queries.query: Create a requirements traceability matrix from this acceptance brief and show source quotes, BDD cases, and mapped tests.
assertions: Includes source quote/path for every REQ row
Uses positive/negative/boundary/integration BDD cases when applicable
Marks coverage state as mapped, gap, blocked, or not-applicable

trigger_queries.query: Compare this existing implementation to the spec and classify drift without assuming .spec-driven or GSD files exist.
assertions: Classifies implemented, missing, drifted, orphan-test, ambiguous-source, or blocked-tooling
Requests priority rules before rewriting conflicting source requirements

trigger_queries.query: Write requirements for a better system from scratch with no PRD or source artifact.
assertions: Blocks requirement locking because no stable source exists
Does not invent REQ rows as if sourced

stacked_scenario.prompt: Convert this API spec into REQ-* items, derive acceptance tests, persist progress, then hand off to TDD execution.
expected_behavior: hm-spec-driven-authoring locks falsifiable requirements and acceptance tests
hm-planning-with-files persists requirement IDs and status when multi-session state is needed
hm-test-driven-execution receives a handoff packet for RED/GREEN/REFACTOR only after requirements are locked
failure_signals: Implementation begins before requirements are locked
Requirements lack source trace or verification methods
